rulings.Case Title: KIMBERLY SANCHEZ VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order To Apportion And Distribute Funds
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2016, Tuesday, in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion for order to apportion and distribute funds: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30a.m. Brayton Purcell must bring a proposed order to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/GLW)
